{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322063525D25C7009CBA5E812C4E2"}"},"total":5676},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7067520514276754184","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好喜欢，找了好久终于有符合我口味的末世文了，女主很强，也不拖后腿，目前出现的女性角色也不像很多小说里无脑嫉妒心重的，也没有什么极品亲戚和旁人拖后腿，面对朋友不是无条件信任，喜欢喜欢!"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1645535351,"group_id":"7034862654384507912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"第一次尝试写作，请多指教","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nygbiww+C9AS2eCMvmX6DOAdgTrSN+x01pVO6qUnQL4T","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/91651dfe2e4948bf9e68d4198cbc4cda~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707898&x-signature=yb7fFEcvF%2FcSBVuYkoS1OYBNvsY%3D","user_id":"2400975979813645","user_name":"爱吃莲藕银耳汤的蓝珍"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2400975979813645","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1733060624,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7034862654384507912","book_info":{"abstract":"【重生+空间+女强】
前世的云疏怀因拥有特殊型异能被爱人背叛，那人搂着新欢亲手将她送上变态科学家的实验台，让她遭受非人的折磨致死。
一朝重回三年前末世还未到来的时候，她发现自己竟带着空间和比重生前更加强悍的异能。
空间里无穷的土地为她产出源源不断的食物，升级后的空间更是开启诸多权限。
谁说辅助不能输出，身为一个辅助型异能者，在别人还躲在基地里瑟瑟发抖的时候，云疏怀已经带领自己的团队在丧尸聚集地里杀的七进七出，路上还捡到某前世基地大佬。
什么？大佬才是我初恋！？

一朝重回三年前末世还未到来的时候，她发现自己竟带着空间和比重生前更加强悍的异能。
